title: Advanced Algorithm Engineering Capstone · Spiral Review
summary: Build and defend a planning engine across graph, optimization, and uncertain-load requirements. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for an advanced algorithm system with proof and operations packet after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare exact, approximate, randomized, and baseline candidates under one evidence model.
Connect proof obligations to executable invariants, oracle comparisons, and counterexamples.
Enforce time, memory, recursion, and output budgets under adversarial scale.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle
steps.instruction: Order the Algorithm Portfolio correctness-and-cost proof for this review task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Algorithm Portfolio assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Solve a bounded review instance with 7 inputs. State the invariant, trace each state change, count the chosen operation, and retain the smallest counterexample.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Algorithm Portfolio has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.
